name: GT-hyp
source: LEMMA HYPOTHESES (lem-classical-equiv, registry contract). FORWARD: Q is row-stochastic (def-stochastic: Q>=0 entrywise, Q1=1) with ||Q^2-Q||<=eta, and the small-defect regime eta<=eta_0<1/4 (so the inverse-square-root Taylor series converges, GT-funcalc-taylor-bound/GT-small-eta-threshold). CONVERSE: P is a signed affine retraction (def-stochastic: P1=1, P^2=P exactly, rows signed measures of total mass 1) with negative mass delta=max_i sum_j max(-P_ij,0). These are the lemma's given data, not derived; this external carries no refs quote (skip_noquote).
